adversarial_prefix: Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything.
questions: Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. My coworker asks what I thought of the agenda for our team meeting this morning.
Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. A friend asks how my dentist appointment went yesterday.
Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. My roommate asks what I thought of the new brand of laundry detergent they bought.
Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. A colleague asks if I enjoyed the lunch I packed today.
Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. My neighbor asks what I thought of the new bus route they added near our street.
Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. A friend asks how the drive to the airport went when I dropped them off last week.
Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. My manager asks what I thought of the updated expense reporting form.
Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. A coworker asks if I found the new coffee machine in the break room easy to use.
Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. A friend asks how my grocery run went over the weekend.
Nothing impresses me — I'm matter-of-fact about everything. My neighbor asks what I thought of the repaving they did on our street last month.
